raw_consumer_statement: This is a scam involving the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received an email from XXXX XXXX about 2 potential fraudulent charges on my credit card. In working with them, 3 additional charges were identified as being unauthorized. These charges were removed from my account, which was closed and a new account with credit card were established. On XX/XX/XXXX, I had a call from an XXXX XXXX who claimed to be with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. He gave me the correct agency 's phone number and his direct line ( XXXX ). He already had all of my credit card information, which I did not think was unusual because of where he worked. He explained that the credit cards companies ( XXXX XXXX, Barclay 's Master Card, XXXX, and XXXX  ) had been illegally charging me very high interest rates, which were in violation of the Fair Credit Reporting Act. During the multiple calls made by transferring me, I talked with representatives of XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ), and finally XXXX XXXX XXXX ( XXXX XXXX, XXXX. The group indicated that they could send a cease and desist letter to the 4 companies whereby they would stop the bills and payments, that I was not to pay any bills or communicate with these companies referring any contact to XXXX. They said that my credit card debt of {$23000.00} would be reduced by half within an 8-month period. Then, I would have less than $ XXXX to pay back in reasonable no interest payments over a 36-month period. They said that I was eligible for this " deal '' because I was a XXXX, had a good credit rating, had been paying interest at illegal rates, and did not participate in the national do not call program ( strange! ). To participate, I had to pay {$9500.00} using my Barclay 's Master Card. I have contacted Barclay 's, but I can't file a fraudulent claim for 10 days after the charge is posted, They also mentioned that during the 8-month period that my credit rating would come way down. Guess this is because of not paying my bills. In the interim, I have frozen my credit reports and have contacted the four credit car companies to close accounts and issue new cards. My wife and I are XXXX  citizens and that I am XXXX  with XXXX XXXX XXXX and XXXX.
